description: Slidev deck library index for agent-driven deck construction

pattern.description: Deck structural patterns defining slide sequences

animation.description: Reusable animation pattern definitions with syntax examples

style.description: Composable CSS presets for colors, typography, textures

component.description: Reusable Vue components for slide construction

entries.name: Dark Blue (AI Startup)
entries.description: Deep navy background with blue accents. Default for tech/AI presentations.

entries.name: Minimal Light
entries.description: Clean white background with blue accent. Best for data-heavy presentations.

entries.name: Premium Dark (Gold)
entries.description: Near-black background with gold accents. Luxury/fintech positioning.

entries.name: Growth Green
entries.description: Mint/white background with green accents. Sustainability, biotech, climate.

entries.name: Professional Blue
entries.description: White background with navy/blue accents. Corporate, enterprise B2B.

entries.name: YC 10-Slide Investor Pitch
entries.description: Standard Y Combinator 10-slide format: Title, Problem, Solution, Traction, Why Us/Now, Business Model, Market, Team, Ask, Closing.

entries.name: Lightning Talk (5 slides)
entries.description: 5-minute lightning talk: Cover, Problem+Solution, Traction, Demo, Ask.

entries.name: Product Demo (8-12 slides)
entries.description: Product demonstration deck with screenshots, code, and live demo embeds.

entries.name: Investor Update
entries.description: Quarterly investor update: Highlights, Metrics, Financials, Runway, Priorities.

entries.name: Partnership Proposal
entries.description: Business partnership pitch: Mutual value, problem/solution, market fit.

entries.name: Fade In
entries.description: CSS fade entrance via v-click opacity transition.

entries.name: Slide In Below
entries.description: v-motion y-axis entrance with optional spring physics.

entries.name: Metric Cascade
entries.description: Staggered v-motion entrance for KPI slides with scale and opacity.

entries.name: Rough Marks
entries.description: v-mark emphasis patterns for hand-drawn style text highlighting.

entries.name: Staggered List
entries.description: v-clicks with depth and every parameters for progressive list reveal.

entries.name: Scale In Pop
entries.description: v-motion spring scale entrance for CTAs and emphasis elements.

entries.name: Dark Blue Navy Colors
entries.description: Navy background with blue accents color variables.

entries.name: Dark Gold Premium Colors
entries.description: Near-black background with gold accents color variables.

entries.name: Light Green Growth Colors
entries.description: Mint/white background with green accents color variables.

entries.name: Light Blue Corporate Colors
entries.description: White background with blue/navy accents color variables.

entries.name: Montserrat + Inter Typography
entries.description: Montserrat headings with Inter body text.

entries.name: Playfair + Inter Typography
entries.description: Playfair Display serif headings with Inter body text.

entries.name: Inter Only Typography
entries.description: All-sans clean look using Inter for everything.

entries.name: Grid Overlay Texture
entries.description: Subtle grid background for technical/structured feel.

entries.name: Noise Grain Texture
entries.description: Film grain SVG overlay for premium/editorial feel.

entries.name: MetricCard
entries.description: Single KPI metric display with animated entrance.

entries.name: TeamMember
entries.description: Team member card with photo, name, role, and bio.

entries.name: TimelineItem
entries.description: Milestone on a timeline with date, label, and status.

entries.name: ComparisonCol
entries.description: Column for side-by-side comparison layouts.
